problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
